q1.prompt: Hepatitis D virus (HDV) is a unique "defective" RNA virus that can only establish a productive infection in individuals who are also infected with the Hepatitis B virus (HBV). Which specific HBV component is required by HDV for its assembly and infectivity?

options.label: HBV surface antigen (HBsAg) for its envelope
HBV core antigen (HBcAg) for its protein shell
